Game.Name: Super Chinese World 3 - Chou Jigen Daisakusen (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Chinese World 3 is a Role-Playing game, published by Culture Brain,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Debug MenusAt the password screen, enter the following Japanese characters to access the special password screen (format is Row #, Column #): - 1,7 - 3,9 - 2,6 -. If done right, you'll enter a secret green password screen. Enter the following passwords to access the different debug menus.Cheat: Debug MenusAt the password screen, enter the following Japanese characters. Format is Row #, Column #.Cheat: Debug MenusAt the password screen, enter the following Japanese characters. Format is Row #, Column #.
